name: manage_segments
description: List and inspect audience segments in your Beehiiv publication. View segment definitions, retrieve the subscribers belonging to a segment, and recalculate segment membership to ensure up-to-date targeting.

parameters.name: publication_id
parameters.description: The ID of your Beehiiv publication.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of segments to return per page.

data.name: Highly Engaged
data.description: Subscribers who opened 5+ emails in the last 30 days
